aktivitaet_name.label: Name der Aktivität
aktivitaet_name.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

aktivitaet_beschreibung.label: Beschreibung
aktivitaet_beschreibung.description: A string value that can contain multiple lines of text (or `null`/`None`).

aktivitaet_kategorie.label: Kategorie
aktivitaet_kategorie.description:
One selected option of multiple available options (or `null`/`None`).

The available options are defined in the `lookup_data` attribute of this control.

The field value will be the key in this `lookup_data` attribute (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

kategorie_name.label: Name der Stimmungskategorie
kategorie_name.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

kategorie_beschreibung.label: Beschreibung
kategorie_beschreibung.description: A string value that can contain multiple lines of text (or `null`/`None`).

kategorie_emoji.label: Emoji (optional)
kategorie_emoji.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

eintrag_datum.label: Datum
eintrag_datum.description:
A calendar date consisting of year, month and day (or `null`/`None`)

The field value will be a string in the format `<YYYY>-<MM>-<DD>` (or `null`/`None`).

For example: `2000-02-29`.

eintrag_stimmung.label: Deine Stimmung
eintrag_stimmung.description:
A reference to a LivingApp record from the target lookup app 'Stimmungskategorien' with the id `69a750a99c53392e0001a840` (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be a valid record URL in the form `https://my.living-apps.de/rest/apps/69a750a99c53392e0001a840/<record-id>` (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

eintrag_aktivitaeten.label: Aktivitäten
eintrag_aktivitaeten.description:
Arbitrary number of referenced LivingApp records from the target lookup app 'Aktivitäten' with the id `69a750a14a90d7e3986895bf`.

The field value will be a list of valid record URLs in the form `https://my.living-apps.de/rest/apps/69a750a14a90d7e3986895bf/<record-id>`.

Displayed as a multi-select field in HTML pages.

eintrag_notizen.label: Notizen zum Tag
eintrag_notizen.description: A string value that can contain multiple lines of text (or `null`/`None`).

moment_zeitpunkt.label: Datum und Uhrzeit
moment_zeitpunkt.description:
A specific moment in time consisting of year, month, day, hour and minute (or `null`/`None`)

The field value will be a string in the format `<YYYY>-<MM>-<DD>T<HH>:<MM>` (or `null`/`None`).

For example: `2000-02-29T11:30`.

moment_beschreibung.label: Beschreibung des Moments
moment_beschreibung.description: A string value that can contain multiple lines of text (or `null`/`None`).

moment_stimmung.label: Deine Stimmung
moment_stimmung.description:
A reference to a LivingApp record from the target lookup app 'Stimmungskategorien' with the id `69a750a99c53392e0001a840` (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be a valid record URL in the form `https://my.living-apps.de/rest/apps/69a750a99c53392e0001a840/<record-id>` (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

moment_aktivitaeten.label: Zugehörige Aktivitäten
moment_aktivitaeten.description:
Arbitrary number of referenced LivingApp records from the target lookup app 'Aktivitäten' with the id `69a750a14a90d7e3986895bf`.

The field value will be a list of valid record URLs in the form `https://my.living-apps.de/rest/apps/69a750a14a90d7e3986895bf/<record-id>`.

Displayed as a multi-select field in HTML pages.

moment_dankbarkeit.label: Wofür bist du dankbar?
moment_dankbarkeit.description: A string value that can contain multiple lines of text (or `null`/`None`).
